data.biography: Tao Sattaphong Phiangphor is a Thai actor and singer known as AFB. Tao was in True Academy Fantasia Season 8. He studied at Degree Field of International Marketing, International College University (Communication Arts International University).
data.name: Sattaphong Phiangphor
เศรษฐพงศ์ เพียงพอ
